reviews.review_title: Drink 10 cups of coffee and play Kerser
reviews.review_description: Very fast 'endless flyer' game with cool music. No masterpiece but if you have no time to play a big game than Kerser is a good choice.
This game will get boring by your first death. Played for 30 seconds before I wanted a refund.

Everything was good to I clicked play.
When I launch the app the screen go's blank and that's it. I have to take the phone out of the Gear VR to exit the app.
I'm runing it on the Samsung Galaxy S10+ 512gb phone.

Please fix or I'll ask for a refund.
